old_claim.note: Animal-Drawn Plows provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim.note: The scoped implement is an animal-drawn plow modified with a seed funnel behind its share, so the traction plow is its required mechanical base.

source_shape.source_locator: Page 178 defines the seeder-plow as a plow with a funnel fixed behind its share and discusses oxen assigned to field plowing and seeding.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The seed-metering mechanism is an attachment to an existing animal-drawn furrow-cutting plow.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Removing the underlying plow eliminates the share, beam, furrow, and moving platform that make the documented seed funnel work.

ontology_before: The node described generic heavy draft work and treated animal plows as one optional enabler.
ontology_after: The node represents a specific seeder-plow architecture whose base implement is definitionally an animal-drawn plow.
would_reject_if: The Early Dynastic seeding device were shown to operate independently of a moving animal-drawn plow and furrow-cutting share.
short_reason: The seeder is a funnel attachment on an animal-drawn plow.
